summary: Iter 48 full backend + frontend validation of (1) Cart Preview auto-fetch after /suggest, (2) Urgency Badges (sold-out pills), (3) Server split: /events/{id}/recap + /events/{id}/summary extracted to routes/events.py, (4) type-hint pass. Backend: 11/12 pytest green (1 skipped, data-dependent legacy fallback). Frontend: end-to-end planner flow — preview line 'Priya ₹25k · DJ ₹40k', Add-All label '🛒 Add all 2 to cart · ₹65k', 3 sold-out pills (⚠ 0 AVAILABLE ON THIS DATE) for LLM-suggested categories with no artist, 2 planner-match blocks (Priya Sharma from ₹25k, DJ Vortex from ₹40k), click seeds localStorage['bt_event_cart_<primaryId>'] with correct items array + saved_at timestamp + from_planner flag, navigates unauth to /login with 'Cart seeded with 2 artists — one checkout to go!' toast.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/events.py — clean make_router(db, get_current_user, clean) pattern, matches other extracted route modules. Recap active_statuses list includes pending_artist/confirmed/started/completed/reviewed — legacy single-booking fallback preserved via `find_one({id: event_id})`. Auth summary correctly checks role=='admin' OR customer_id match, else 403.

server.py line 3286-3290 registers routes_events.make_router BEFORE the on_event('startup') hook — good. No duplicated route paths (grep confirmed old L1700-1785 body removed, only leftover comment L1700).

EventPlannerPage.jsx useEffect (L42-55) re-fires best-fit on every plan change with cancel-token pattern via a `cancelled` flag — no stale-response race. `matchedPreview` memo (L63) correctly filters matched && package_id. `previewLabel` truncates to 3 with '+N' overflow.

planner-add-all disabled state chain: (seeding || previewLoading || matchedPreview.length===0) — covers 'Checking availability…' during best-fit AND 'No artists available for these categories' when 0 matched. Confirmed empirically that transient loading state renders but resolves in <1s for cached best-fit hits.
PII leak test PASSED — recap response body has zero occurrences of customer_email/customer_phone/amount_paid/platform_fee, and no top-level or per-artist `pricing` object. Safe to expose publicly.

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 executed pytest; 1 skipped due to data-dependent legacy fallback path — non-critical)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — planner-preview-line, planner-add-all (label with total + matched count), 3 planner-soldout-<n> pills, 2 planner-match-<n> blocks with resolved names+prices, click seeds localStorage AND navigates unauth to /login, toast fires correctly

seed_data_creation: None. Reused LIVE_EVENT_ID 074519dd-c59b-4db3-a109-324b3798fbc9 (Priya + Kavya, Mumbai 2034-06-15) for all recap+summary assertions. No new bookings created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 48 is GREEN end-to-end. routes/events.py is now the canonical location for /events/{id}/recap + summary (server.py L1700 has only the migration comment stub, actual endpoints removed). Batch booking/payment endpoints remain in server.py by design (tight coupling to create_booking + calc_booking_pricing). For any future planner UI tests, submit button text is 'Generate my line-up' (NOT 'Generate Plan'). Best-fit resolves in ~500ms so 'Checking availability…' transient label is hard to catch in Playwright — it only shows if you race the click. Sold-out pills appear for LLM-suggested exotic categories (Sitar, Sarod, etc.) that don't exist in the seeded artist set — confirmed working. Note: session fixture in pytest tests must NOT be reused across auth-protected calls when testing 401 paths — use bare requests.get() to avoid header leakage (fixed in test_iter48).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All acceptance criteria met on first test pass.
